steps.title: Set up the weight formula
steps.content:
The calf weighs 5,600 pounds at birth and gains 250 pounds per day. After $n$ days, the calf's weight is:
$$W = 5,600 + 250n$$

steps.title: Translate the constraint into an inequality
steps.content:
The weight must be greater than 8,850 and less than 9,850 pounds. This gives the compound inequality:
$$8,850 < 5,600 + 250n < 9,850$$

steps.title: Solve the inequality
steps.content:
Subtract 5,600 from all parts:
$$3,250 < 250n < 4,250$$
Divide all parts by 250:
$$13 < n < 17$$
Since $n$ must be an integer and $13 < n < 17$, the possible values are 14, 15, and 16.
